## Privacy checklist

- [ ] No new network requests without explicit user opt-in
- [ ] No telemetry or analytics added
- [ ] New data stored locally only (never sent to external servers)
- [ ] If external API is called, it's clearly documented and opt-out

## Testing

- [ ] New tests added (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested manually on Windows 10 or 11
